import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut current = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        if not in_num
          current = 0
          sign = 1
          in_num = true
        end
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      else if b == 45 and not in_num
        in_num = true
        current = 0
        sign = -1
      else
        if in_num
          result = list.push(result, current * sign)
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    result = list.push(result, current * sign)
  end
  result
end

fn dedupe(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not list.contains(result, v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  if n == 0
    sorted
  else
    match list.min(xs)
    when Some(m)
      mut current = m
      sorted = list.push(sorted, current)
      mut count = 1
      mut done = false
      while not done
        if count >= n
          done = true
        else
          mut next_val = 0
          mut found = false
          mut j = 0
          while j < n
            match xs.get(j)
            when Some(v)
              if v > current
                if not found
                  next_val = v
                  found = true
                else if v < next_val
                  next_val = v
                end
              end
            when None
              j = j
            end
            j = j + 1
          end
          if found
            current = next_val
            sorted = list.push(sorted, current)
            count = count + 1
          else
            done = true
          end
        end
      end
      sorted
    when None
      sorted
    end
  end
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums1 = parse_ints(line1)
let nums2 = parse_ints(line2)

mut combined = nums1
mut k = 0
let m2 = nums2.len()
while k < m2
  match nums2.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    combined = list.push(combined, v)
  when None
    k = k
  end
  k = k + 1
end

let uniques = dedupe(combined)
let sorted = sort_unique(uniques)
println(format_list(sorted))
